name: business-content
description: Net-new content-authoring skills for the Wayland business packs: a long-form direct-response About page and a HARO/Qwoted expert-source reply. Enriches the existing editorial/content-director role; ships no duplicate persona.
author: Wayland Business Pack

skills.name: content-about-page
skills.description: Build a long-form direct-response About page that converts visitors into subscribers and buyers: hook with the reader's problem, tell a story-of-discovery, prove the path with results, and close with an explicit next step. Outputs a structured content brief plus paste-ready section copy. The awareness-layer trust asset, distinct from a short bio or a full sales page.

skills.name: content-haro-reply
skills.description: Write a HARO / Qwoted / SourceBottle expert-source reply that gets quoted rather than buried: a credentialed one-liner that answers why this source for this query, the answer in 3-5 tight specific bullets with a contrarian take, and a pull quote written to be lifted verbatim. The earned-media expert-quote deliverable.
